body.title: Create /concept skill — collaborative reference material authoring
body.result: Created /concept skill at lab/claudecode/cc_skills/concept/SKILL.md + ~/.claude/skills/concept/SKILL.md. Supports /concept new (talk-over, draft, accord-check, palace write), list, show, update. Writes palace.concepts.* nodes to adc.palace.
body.description:
Build the /concept skill for collaboratively authoring and recording architectural reference material. A concept is declarative ('the shape of things'), not historical — no D-xxx ancestry, no spawned_tickets, no hypothesis. The skill guides CC and Akien through talking it over, drafting the record, accord check, and writing to palace.concepts.*.

Concept record shape:
  name: C-<kebab-slug>
  title: <one-line what-is-this>
  content: <present-tense declarative explanation of the shape>
  related_goals: [G-xxx, ...]
  related_concepts: [C-xxx, ...]

Skill commands: /concept new, /concept list, /concept show C-xxx, /concept update C-xxx

Flow: (1) talk it over in conversation, (2) CC drafts the record, (3) explicit accord check — 'does this capture it?', (4) write to palace.concepts.*, (5) append to concept index.

**Affected files:** ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_skills/concept/SKILL.md (new)
**Design rules:** none apply — new skill, no palace rule conflicts
**Scope boundary:** The skill file only. Seeding initial concepts is T-concept-palace-seed. Linking /sorted to concepts is T-sorted-concept-links.
**Test plan:** no automated tests — skill is a CC behavior spec; validate by running /concept new on one concept and checking palace.concepts.* node was written correctly
